content.en:
"Ten Thousand Blades of Light and Rain!"

The aurora turned into a round of the sun This is the manifestation of the avenue of light, and it is already the avenue of light that has reached the ultimate level of the realm of the avenue of law, and it has turned into a round of sun, which is many times more terrifying than the real sun.

Infinite rain of light shot out from the sun, attacking Ye Tian, and every drop of light rain was enough to kill an ordinary galaxy-level.

Infinite light and rain gather together, forming a terrifying power!

This belongs to the Great Dao True Technique, just like Ye Tian's Chaos True Technique, and the Aurora is a True Skill of Light!

It can be seen from the means of the aurora that in other cosmic eras, the Great Dao True Technique is a very common means, but in this cosmic era, it is very rare.

Of course, this has something to do with the development of the current cosmic era.

"Chaos Haifa Phase, now!"

"Chaos God Golem!"

Since Ye Tian's Chaos Sea Law Phase was almost compressed to the size of an ancient well, the Chaos God Statue formed was only a little larger than Ye Tian's body.

However, if Ye Tian wanted to expand the Chaos God Demon, it would be a matter of thought.

But once the Chaos God Golem becomes larger, the local defense will naturally be weaker, and the larger Chaos God Golem will be more domineering in appearance.

As a result, Ye Tian made the Chaos God Golem bigger, turning it into a huge Chaos God Golem with the sky above his head and his feet on the void.

Puff puff!!!

Countless rains of light bombarded the Chaos God Golem, and they couldn't break through the Chaos God Golem's defenses at all.

"It's my turn!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and a Hell Divine Sky Spear appeared.

Burst!

The Hell's Spear of the Sky attacked the Aurora.

Today's Hell Divine Sky Spear, a great spatial supernatural power, is already in the realm of Xiaocheng, and it is not a new entry into the realm of Xiaocheng, but a great spatial supernatural power close to the middle stage of Xiaocheng, how terrifying its power is.

And Ye Tian almost exerted the power of this space supernatural power, and no longer kept his hand.

"Not good!"

Aurora's face changed drastically, and he sensed the terrifying power of the Hell's Divine Sky Spear, and the feeling of near-death came to his heart, making him experience the feeling of death for the second time.

The first time I realized death was the great destruction of the universe, and the second time is now!

"Aurora Aegis!"

"Shroud of Ten Thousand Lights!"

"God-level defense talent!"

"Heavenly Extreme Secret Scale Secret Technique!"

......

Aurora almost instantly used all of his defensive means, just to block Ye Tian's Hell Divine Sky Spear.

Rumble!!!!

The Hellish Divine Sky Spear bombarded Aurora's body, although it did not completely penetrate Aurora's body, but the terrifying spatial rules shattered half of his body through special methods.

In an instant, the aura of the aurora dropped sharply, and he was hit hard!

"Run!"

Aurora wanted to escape from here, he knew that he was not Ye Tian's opponent, if Ye Tian cast the Hell Divine Sky Spear again, he might not even be able to resist it.

"Damn, this guy has hidden his strength before, even one of the most terrifying sons of the era of our universe can't have such a powerful combat power, right?"

Aurora thought.

But if he wanted to escape in the hands of Ye Tian, who had the talent of time and space, it was almost unrealistic.

"Time freezes!"

"Space Confinement!"

The power of time and space sealed this void, and although it could not imprison the aurora, it could greatly reduce his speed.

Soon, Aurora was captured by Ye Tian and sealed Xiuwei, and he couldn't escape in a short period of time.

With the defeat of Aurora being captured, all the ten sons of the era who entered the Ten Thousand Realms this time were captured by Ye Tian and sealed in the Void Mina Realm in his hands.

"The mission is half complete, it's time to contact the Ten Thousand Worlds!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It is not very difficult to contact the Ten Thousand Worlds, the Ten Thousand Realms are not too special, Ye Tian has many ways to contact the outside world, and one of the ways is to use a communication device sent by the Kunwu Supreme.

This messaging device can be contacted by the outside world and is not considered cheating.

Immediately, Ye Tian turned on this communication device and tried to contact Kunwu Supreme.

......

Outside.

The Kunwu Supreme was sitting in a palace resting, when suddenly the communication equipment vibrate.

"Eh, it's Ye Tian!"

Kunwu Supreme reacted and hurriedly turned on the communication equipment.

Wow!

A phantom appeared, and it was Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, how's it going?"

Kungo Supreme asked.

Ye Tian said truthfully: "According to the plan, I captured a son of the era, but I didn't get the real secret, and these sons of the era don't know how to dodge the great destruction of the universe. According to the information I received, these sons of the era did die in the Great Destruction of the Universe, but before the Great Destruction of the Universe, they entered a gate of light, and then died one by one. According to my guess, it's a bit like reincarnation. They have entered reincarnation, but it stands to reason that reincarnation cannot avoid the collapse of the universe. Unable to get useful information, I carried out a second plan, and now, all the children of the ten epochs have been captured by me!"

"What, you captured the Children of the Ten Eras?"

Kunwu Supreme was shocked.

He originally thought that Ye Tian could only deal with a few sons of the era at most, because the strength of the sons of the era was weak and strong, and the ten sons of the era must have very powerful sons of the era, and Ye Tian was not necessarily an opponent.

But he never expected that Ye Tian was so strong and captured all the sons of the ten eras, which was somewhat unexpected to him.

"Okay, good !!" Kunwu Supreme praised again and again: "Ye Tian, I'll confirm it, and then go to the first god lord of the god clan, although I also want to talk to the Lord of the Yuan Gu directly, but with my strength, I am really not qualified to talk to the Lord of the Yuan Gu." "

"Kunwu Supreme, please look!"

Ye Tian projected the scene in the Void Mina Realm and presented it in the line of sight of the Kunwu Supreme by means of projection of the communication equipment.

When he saw the ten sons of the era who were in a more embarrassed state, Kun Wu Supreme nodded with satisfaction.

"Okay, I'll go and contact the First God Lord and the First Demon Master!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

Immediately, the Kunwu Supreme came to the temporary palace where the First Divine Lord of the Protoss was located.

Soon, many supreme beings of all races in the universe came together.

"First Divine Master, my Terran Ye Tian has already executed the second plan, and has successfully captured the sons of the ten eras, so he can immediately execute the second half of the second plan!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"Really?"

The First Divine Lord asked, somewhat surprised.

"Seriously!"

Kunwu Supreme affirmed.

"I've underestimated Ye Tian a little!" The First Divine Lord was slightly shocked, and there was also some jealousy in his expression.

If it was before, he would have wanted to destroy Ye Tian as soon as possible, but now he can't do this.

Ye Tian was more valuable alive than dead, otherwise they would have no means to sanction the forces of those twelve universe epochs.

The Protoss is no longer the number one force in the universe now, so naturally they don't dare to fight internally anymore.

Subsequently, the Kunwu Supreme contacted Ye Tian and projected the projection to the Supremes present to watch.

"Let's go, let's go find the Lord of the Yuangu!"

The first god said in a hurry.

Whoa!!

A group of Supremes flew to the Lord of the Ancient and other Supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras.
